titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Jen Yu-wen Papers
titlestmt.author: compiled by Dong Feng and Chi-wah Chan

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday December 3, 2020 at 08:07

did.unittitle: Jen Yu-wen papers

descriptivenote.p: The material is in Chinese, Japanese, and English.

did.abstract: The papers document Jen Yu-wen's (Jian Youwen) research and writings on the Taiping Rebellion (1850-1866) and General Feng Yuxiang. The papers include drafts of The Taiping Revolutionary Movement , correspondence, articles and clippings.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of Jen Yu-wen, 1968. Transferred by the East Asia Library Curator in 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 20 are restricted due to condition.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Some monographs were retained in the East Asia Library and cataloged separately.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Jen Yu-wen Papers (MS 1924). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Jen Yu-wen (Jian Youwen) was born in Canton, China, in 1896. Jen was baptized as a Christian in 1910. He attended Oberlin College and obtained his master's degree from the University of Chicago in 1919. He returned to China in 1921. While teaching at Yenching University in Peiping, he met General Feng Yuxiang (1882-1948), a powerful warlord in northern China in the 1920s. In 1926, Jen joined the political party, Kuo-min tang, and was sent to work in Feng Yuxiang's army.

In 1936, Jen founded the literary historical journal, Yijing . Later in 1938, he founded a second journal, Typhoon Magazine , which ceased publication in 1941 when Japan occupied Hong Kong. After 1949, Jen moved to Hong Kong and devoted more attention to his Taiping studies. From 1954 to 1965, Jen Yu-Wen held research fellowships at the Institute of Oriental Studies of the University of Hong Kong, the Academia Sinica in Taiwan and Yale University. He completed two monumental three-volume works covering the entire history of the Taiping Rebellion, Taiping tianguo dian zhi tong kao (Studies on the Institutions of Taiping tianguo) and Taiping tianguo quan shi (Complete History of Taiping tianguo). His The Taiping Revolutionary Movement was published by the Yale University Press in 1973.

Jen had a long, multifaceted career as educator, historical scholar, government official, political advisor, art collector, folklorist, storyteller, and librettist. Jen Yu-wen died in Hong Kong in 1978.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p:
The papers, consisting of drafts of
The Taiping Revolutionary Movement
, correspondence, articles, and clippings document Jen Yu-Wen's research and writings on the Taiping Rebellion (1850-1866) and General Feng Yuxiang, a powerful warlord in northern China in the 1920s. The bulk of the papers are in Series I, which consists of Jen Yu-Wen's writings and research materials on the Taiping Rebellion. Thirteen of the nineteen boxes in the series consist of drafts of Jen Yu-wen's
The Taiping Revolutionary Movement
, which was published by Yale University Press in 1973. The rest of the series contains articles and artifacts of Jen Yu-Wen and materials collected by Jen Yu-Wen on the Taiping Rebellion. The second series consists of an autobiography, diary, and photograph of Feng Yuxiang. It is unclear whether the autobiography is original or a manuscript copy. With the exception of the book drafts, most of the material is in Chinese and Japanese.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged in two series. Series I: The Taiping Rebellion. Series II: General Feng Yuxiang.

did.unittitle: The Taiping Rebellion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series I consists of writings and research materials on the Taiping Rebellion. It is divided into four sections. The first section includes Jen Yu-Wen's works on the Taiping Rebellion, including different drafts of Jen Yu-Wen's book The Taiping Revolutionary Movement , published journal articles, research notes and Jen Yu-Wen's personal articfacts. The second section includes works on the Taiping Rebellion by other scholars. The third section consists of maps.

Name index. (Chinese and English)
Articles
You Hong Xiuquan de gu xiang suo de dao de Taiping tianguo xin shi liao = "A Visit to Hung Hisu-ch'uan's Native Village in Hua-hsien, Kwangtung." "遊洪秀全故鄉所得到的太平天國新史料."
Gan wang ti bi da zi zhi xin fa xian = "The Rediscovery of Kan wang Hung Jen-kan's Calligraphy." "干王題壁大字之新發現."
Zhejiang wen xian zhan lan hui zhong zhi Taiping wen xian = "Taiping Historical Materials in the Chekiang Exposition." "浙江文獻展覽會中之太平文獻."
Wu zhong wen xian zhan lan hui zhong zhi Taiping wen wu = "Taiping Historical Materials in the Soochow Exposition." "吳中文獻展覽會中太平文物."
Changshu fang bei ji = "Rediscovery of a Taiping Memorial Tablet in Chang-shu, Kiangsu." "常熟 訪碑記."
"A Letter to Professor Franz Michael."
Published Articles
"New Sidelights on the Taiping Rebellion."
"On the Legal System in T'ai-p'ing t'ien-kuo" / G. Kawabata.
Taiping tianguo de Jidu jiao = "Taiping Christianity." "太平天國基督教."
Taiping tianguo zhi sheng shuai qin mang guan = "On the Rise and Decline of the Taiping tienkuo." "太平天國之盛衰興亡觀."
"The Marxian Interpretation of Taiping tienkuo." (typescripts)
Zhong wang qin bi gong ci zhi chu bu yan jiu = "Primary Study on Chung wang Li Hsiu-ch'eng's Confessional Statements." "忠王親筆供辭之初步研究."
Taiping tianguo xin wen xian = "A New Official Document of Taiping tienkuo." "太平天國新文獻."
Taiping tianguo yu Zhongguo wen hua = "Taiping tienkuo and Chinese Culture." "太平天國與中國文化."
Zai lun Taiping tianguo yu min zu zhu yi = "Taiping tianguo and Nationalism." "再論太平天國與民族主義."
Zhang Gan Bai yun shan di bie xiao zhi = "A Note on Chang Kan's Land Document of Mount Bai Yun." "張亁白雲山地莂小誌."
Zhong wang qin bi gong ci kao wu = "Errors in Chung wang Li Hsiu-ch'eng's Confessional Statements." "忠王親筆供詞考誤."
"The Institute of Historical Culture of Guandong Province: A Record of its History and Achievements." "廣東省級文獻事業紀實."
"Hong Xiuquan zhi si" = "The Death of Hong Xiuquan." "洪秀全之死."
'Hong Xiuquan yu Zhu Jiujiang" = "Hong Xiuquan and Zhu Jiujian." "洪秀全與朱九江."
Taiping tianguo suo lu = "Notes on Taiping tianguo." "太平天國瑣錄."
"Concerning the Cause of Failure of the Taiping Revolution."

Offprints of
The Taiping Revolutionary Movement
. Partial
Shang yu dang wei jiao juan mu lu suo yin = "Index and Bibliography of the Shang Yu Dang in microfilms.""上諭檔微膠卷目錄索引."
Yi wang yuan zheng jun shi nian yue baio = "Chronological table of military expedition of the King of Wing." "翼王遠征軍事年月表"

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: These records are restricted due to condition.

Writings of others
Articles
Hong Daquan kao = "On Hong Daquan" 洪大泉考" / Luo Ergang 羅爾鋼
Shen Changzhou cheng shou ri ji = "The Refugee of Ch'angchou" "庚申常州城守日記" / Wu Mangong 吳曼公
Taiping tianguo shi liao ji qi yan jiu fang fa = "The Materials and the Research method of Taiping tianguo" "太平天國史料及其研究方法" / Zhu Qianzhi 朱謙之
Tian de wang zhi mi = "The Mystery of the King of Tiande" "天德王之謎" / Zhu Qianzhi 朱謙之
Shang Taiping jun shu de Huang Wan kao = "Study on Wang Wan" 上太平軍書的黃畹考" / Luo Ergang 羅爾鋼"
"Yi wang Shi Dakai lue zhuan" = "A Short Biography of Shi Dakai""翼王石達開略傳" / Luo Ergang 羅爾鋼. (Chinese)
Tian de wang Hong Daquan kao = "On Hong Daquan" 天德王洪大泉考" / Xiao Yishan 蕭一山
Tian guo tong bao = "One Short Note on a Taiping Coin" "天國通寶" / Ma Dingxiang 馬定祥"
Guan yu Zhao Liewen, Neng jing ju ri ji On Zhao Liewen's Diary of Neng jing ju 關於趙烈文 能靜居日記 / Tao Yinghui 陶英惠
"Review on Jen Yu-Wen's Studies on the Institutions of Tai-p'ing T'ien-kuo" / Kung-chuan Hsiao
Tai ping tian guo shi dai Guizhou Miao min qi yi = "The Rebellion of Maio in Guizhou During the Period of Taiping tianguo" "太平天國時代貴州苗民起義" / Xu Qingjian 徐慶堅
Tai ping jun Yong'an tu wei = "The Breakthrough of Taiping Army in Rong'an" "太平軍永安突圍" / Gu Lu 古蘆"
"Review on JenbYu-Wen's Studies on the Institutions of T'ai-p'ing T'ien-kuo" / Tsung-han Yang
"Enforcement of Hsiang-kuan chih-tu System of Rural Officials, in the T'ai-p'ing T'ien-kuo and its Background" / Kawabata Genji
Lun Tai ping ge ming = On the Taiping Revolution" "论太平革命 / Robert E. Speer, trans. Jian Youwen
Tai ping tian guo shi bai de yuan yin = "The Causes for the Failure of Taiping tienguo" "太平天國失敗的原因" / Huang Dashou 黃大受
Li Xiucheng gong ci yuan gao ji tou xiang wen ti zhi yan jiu = "A Study on the Draft of Li Xiucheng's Confession and the Question of his Surrender" "李秀成供詞原稿及投降問題之研究" / Zhang Qun 章羣
Fu Xiao dao hui fei ji lue = "Some Supplementary Materials on the Triads in Amoy and South Fukien" "附小刀會匪記略"
Hong jin jun zai Jiangmen = "The Red Turban Army in Jiangmen" "紅巾軍在江門" / Zhu Gongmian 朱勉躬
Qiang chuan shi mo = "On the Triad Qiang Chuan" "鎗船始末" / Wan Liu 萬流
"The Visions of Hung-Siu-tshuen, and Origin of the Kwang-si Insurrection" / Rev. Theodore Hamberg
"Huzhou Yizhou tao nan ji" = "Fleeing from Huzhou and Yizhou" "湖州益州逃難記" / Wu Changshuo 吳昌碩
San shi san ri tuo nan ji' = Thirty-three Days in Fleeing" "三十三日脫難記" / Yang Taiyi楊泰頥"
Yuezhou ji lue = "A Brief Account of Yuezhou During the Confrontation between the Taiping and the Qing" "越州紀略" / Guo Mengyun 郭夢雲
Tai ping jun de shi Jiaxing ji shi = "The true account of the success and failure of the Taiping army in Jiaxing" "太平軍得失嘉興紀實 " / Mei Yuanding 梅元鼎"
"Lin Fengxiang shi na li ren?" = "Who is Lin Fengxiang?" "林鳳祥是那裏人?" / Zhong Bo 鍾勃
"Li Xiucheng zhuan" = "The Biography of Li Xiucheng" "李秀成傳" / Chen Erdong 陳邇冬

Tai ping tian guo rui tian yu fu ting zuo deng gao shi = "The official notice from the Tai ping tian guo" "太平天國瑞天豫傅佐廷等告示"; "Tai ping tian guo rui tian yu fu ting deng zhi Li Duanda lan tian shun shu" = "A letter from the Tai ping tian guo to Li Duanda" "太平天國瑞天豫傅佐廷等致李短韃藍天順書"; "Shi Dakai gei Fuling cheng ren min yu" = "An order from Shi Dakai to the people of Fuling" "石達開給涪陵城人民諭"; "Shi Dakai bu gao" = "A notice from Shi Dakai" "石達開佈告" / Shang Chengzuo 商承祚
Modern Chinese History Project-Far Eastern Institute University of Washington: Political Ideology in 19th Century China / Hellmutt Wilhelm
Li Xiucheng qin gong kao = "A Study on Li Xiucheng's Confession" "李秀成親供考" / Yang Jialuo 楊家"
Lun Zhongguo zhi bai nian ge ming = "On the Chinese Revolution in the Last One Hundred Years" "論中國之百年革命"
Lun Tai ping guo ge ming = "On the Taiping Revolution" "論太平天國革命" / Zeng Shifeng 曾時峯
Original Text of Rev. Theodore Hamberg's Report to the Basel Evangelical Society in Switzerland from the Archives of the Basel Mission Society
Tai ping tian guo shi yan jiu lun wen mu lu = "Bibliography of the research articles on Taiping tianguo" "太平天國史研究論文目錄"

Taiping tian guo qi yi bai nian ji nian zhan lan hui zhan chu mu lu

A Catalogue of the Exhibit in Commemorating the Centennial of the Taiping Revolutionary Movement

"Military Organization and Power Structure of China During the Taiping Rebellion" / Franz Michael
"Christian Influence Upon the Ideology of the Taiping Rebellion" / Eugene P. Boardman
"Interpretations of the Taiping Tien-kuo By Noncommunist Chinese Writers" / Vincent Yu-chung Shih
"Meadows on China: A Centennial Review" / John K. Fairbank
"Documentary Collections on Modern Chinese History" / John K. Fairbank and Mary C. Wright
"The Controversy over Li Hsiu-ch'eng: An Ill-timed Centenary" / Stephen Uhalley, Jr.
"The Mental Illness of Hung Hsiu-ch'uan, Leader of the Taiping Rebellion" / P. M. Yap
"The Background of Tseng Kuo-Fan's Ideology" / Hellmut Wilhelm

Hong Xiuquan quan zhuan

The Biography of Hong Xiuquan
洪秀全全傳
"Quan bi kao" = "A Study on Taiping Coin" "泉幣考"
Ji Shi Dakai bei qin jiu si shi = "The Capture and Execution of Shi Dakai" "紀石達開被擒就死事" / Ren Naiqiang 任乃強'
Tian de wang Hong Daquan shi ji kao = "The Life of the King of Heavenly Virtue Hong Daquan" "天德王洪大全事蹟考" / Xiao Yishan 蕭一山
Chugoku kenkyu no kinkan sushu = "A few recent publications on Chinese Studies""中國研究の近刊數種" / Muramatsu Yuji 村松祐次

Taihei Tengoku ni okeru kyokan setchi no jittai: So Setsu kohin chitai no ichirei ni yotte = "The establishment of local government in Taihei Tengoku" "太平天國における鄉官設置の實態: 蘇浙湖濱地帶の一例によつて" / Kawabata Genji 河鰭源治"
Taihei Tengoku no kanka ni tsuite = "The checkpoints in Taihei Tengoku" "太平天國の關卡について" / Kawabata Genji 河鰭源治
Taihei Tengoku ni okeru kyokan sosetsu do so no kei = "The establsihment of local government in Taihei Tengoku and its background" "太平天國における鄉官創置どその背景" / Kawabata Genji 河鰭源治
Taihei Tengoku senryoka Nanjin ni okeru koshi boeki = "The trade in Lake Tai at Nanjin under the occupation of Taihei Tengoku" =太平天國占領下南潯における湖系貿易" / Kawabata Genji 河鰭源治
Taihei Tengoku ezu = "The map of Taihei Tengoku" "太平天國繪圖" / Masui Tsuneo增井經夫
Chugoku ni okeru Taihei Tengoku shi no kenkyu = "The studies of Taihei Tengoku in China" "中國における太平天國史の研究" / Ichiko Chuzo 市古宙三"
"T'ai P'ing Christianity" / C. P. Fritzerald
Guan yu Tai ping tian guo zhao zhi chao = "On the Decree of Taiping tianguo" "關於太平天國詔旨抄" / Xiao Yishan 蕭一山
Fu zhao zhi suo jian ren ming zhi guan biao = "A Table of the Taiping Officials seen in the Decree of Taiping tianguo" "附詔旨所見人名職官表"
Hamberg's Report, English translation.
"The Triad Society or Heaven and Earth Association" / William Stanton.
Jian Youwen xian sheng wu shi nian lai de zhu zuo = "The Bibliography of Jian Youwen's Writings in the Last Fifty Years" "簡又文先生五十年來的著作" / Lan Youlin 林友蘭"
Clippings
Dang ping fa ni tu = Pictures on Suppressing the Taiping Rebels 盪平髮逆圖
Taiping tianguo ji zai = Records on Taiping tianguo 太平天國記載 (I-III)
Taiping tianguo wen wu ce = "Artifacts of Taiping tianguo." "太平天國文物冊"
Taiping tianguo wen shu = "Documents of Taiping tianguo." "太平天國文書"
North China Herald. (Typescripts, English)
Maps
Guangxi quan sheng ge xian di tu = Map of Guangxi Province 廣西全省各縣地圖
Jiangkou Xu = Map of Jiangkou 江口墟
Jintian qi yi = Map of the Uprising in Jintian 金田起義
Guangxi fen xian di tu = Map of Prefectures in Guangxi Province 廣西分縣地圖
Guangxi Sheng quan xian xian tu = Map of Prefectures in Guangxi Province 廣西省全縣縣圖
Mengshan Xian quan tu = Map of Mengshan Prefecture 蒙山縣全圖.
Map of the battle of Anking
Tai ping tian guo qi yi bai nian ji nian zhan lan hui = Posters of Exhibition Commemorating the Centurary of the Uprising of Tai Ping Tian Guo 太平天國起義百年紀念展覽會
Feng Yuxiang

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The series consist of Feng Yuxiang's autobiography (manuscripts), Feng's dairy, and a photograph of Feng himself. Feng Yuxiang (1882-1948) was a warlord in China in the 1920s.

did.unittitle:
Feng Yuxiang zi zhuan
=
The Autobiography of Feng Yuxiang
馮玉祥自傳 (Manuscripts)

Feng Yuxian ri ji
= Diary of Feng Yuxiang
馮玉祥日記
"Feng Yuxiang kan wu" = Feng Yuxiang's Publications 馮玉祥刊物
A Photograph of Feng Yuxiang (original)
